parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT (value::text)::boolean FROM blog_settings WHERE key='generator_paused') AS paused,
  (SELECT (value::text)::int FROM blog_settings WHERE key='generator_pause_threshold') AS threshold,
  (SELECT trim(both '"' from value::text) FROM blog_settings WHERE key='last_pillar') AS last_pillar,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM blog_drafts WHERE status IN ('pending_review','approved')) AS buffer_count,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(t))
     FROM (SELECT pillar, title, slug FROM blog_drafts ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 100) t),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS recent_topics;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-5", max_tokens: 16000, system: [{ type: "text", text: $json.system, cache_control: { type: "ephemeral" } }], messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.user }], tools: [{ name: "emit_post", description: "Emite o post BlogPost estruturado e validado.", input_schema: { type: "object", properties: { slug: { type: "string" }, pillar: { type: "string" }, title: { type: "string" }, description: { type: "string" }, keywords: { type: "string" }, h1: { type: "string" }, lead: { type: "string" }, eyebrow: { type: "string" }, breadcrumbLabel: { type: "string" }, about: { type: "string" }, excerpt: { type: "string" }, sections: { type: "array" }, faqs: { type: "array" }, author: { type: "object" }, publishedAt: { type: "string" }, updatedAt: { type: "string" } }, required: ["slug","pillar","title","description","keywords","h1","lead","eyebrow","breadcrumbLabel","about","excerpt","sections","faqs","author","publishedAt","updatedAt"] } }], tool_choice: { type: "tool", name: "emit_post" } }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE blog_settings SET value = to_jsonb($1::text), updated_at = NOW() WHERE key = 'last_pillar';

parameters.text: ={{ "📚 Centro Clínico Okazaki · Blog " + $input.all().length + " novo(s) rascunho(s) aguardando revisão da Dra. Jane: " + $input.all().map((i, idx) => (idx + 1) + ". " + i.json.title + " " + i.json.pillar + "").join(" ") + " Acesse o editor para revisar, editar, aprovar ou rejeitar." }}

parameters.content:
## Blog Gerador Semanal

Disparo: segunda 08:00 BRT (UTC 11:00).

INSERT usa operation 'insert' nativo (mapping defineBelow) — evita bug de queryReplacement com vírgulas dentro de JSON.

Credentials: Supabase Blog Postgres, Anthropic Blog (HTTP + cache_control + assistant prefill '{'), Telegram Blog Bot.

Grupo Telegram chat_id: -5152728039

5 pilares: gastroenterologia, endoscopia digestiva, colonoscopia, hepatologia, geriatria.

parameters.query: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM blog_drafts WHERE slug = $1 OR lower(trim(title)) = lower(trim($2))) AS is_dup;

parameters.text: ={{ '⚠️ Blog · Rascunho duplicado descartado Título: ' + $json.title + ' Slug: ' + $json.slug + ' Pilar: ' + $json.pillar + ' Motivo: slug ou título já existe em blog_drafts.' }}

parameters.query: SELECT pillar, title, content_json FROM (SELECT pillar, title, content_json, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pillar ORDER BY reviewed_at DESC NULLS LAST) rn FROM blog_drafts WHERE status IN ('approved','published')) t WHERE rn <= 3;
SELECT rule_text, scope FROM blog_style_rules WHERE status='active' ORDER BY decided_at NULLS LAST;
SELECT id, pillar, topic_text FROM blog_topic_suggestions WHERE status='pending' ORDER BY created_at;
UPDATE blog_topic_suggestions SET status='used', used_at=NOW() WHERE id = ANY($1::uuid[]) AND status='pending';
